signal.topic_title: Content Decay — detecting and fixing declining SEO traffic
signal.urgency_reason: Evergreen SEO pain point, amplified by Google algorithm updates and AI Overviews reducing click-through rates
signal.evidence: Ahrefs Blog published 'What Is Content Decay? (And How to Fix It)' — topic has steady search demand at KD22/Vol260

search_intent.detail: Users search 'content decay' to understand the concept and find actionable fixes for declining traffic

keywords_exist.detail: content decay (Vol:260, KD:22), fix content decay (Vol:0), refresh old content seo (Vol:0)

small_site_can_rank.detail: KD 22 is very achievable for small sites; informational intent favors comprehensive guides

sustainable.detail: Evergreen SEO concept — as long as content ages and traffic declines, people will search for solutions

monetizable.detail: CPC $0 but strong affiliate potential for SEO tools (Ahrefs, Semrush, SurferSEO) that detect content decay

metrics.trend_note: Steady informational keyword in SEO niche

reddit.top_post: Off-topic results (content-decay-seo search returned non-SEO posts)
reddit.key_pain_point: Site owners notice traffic drops on old content but don't know systematic approach to diagnose and fix
reddit.key_insight: Need for actionable checklist: identify decaying pages, diagnose cause, update content, resubmit

action.content_plan: Comprehensive guide: what is content decay, how to detect it, step-by-step fix process, prevention strategies
action.monetization: SEO tool affiliate (Ahrefs $99/mo, Semrush $129/mo for content audit features)
next_steps: SERP analysis for 'content decay' to see competition
Build comprehensive guide with content decay detection checklist
Include tool comparison section with affiliate links
